title: Docker Swarm
initializeSwarmDescription: Create a new swarm cluster with this node as the first manager.
joinSwarmDescription: Join an existing swarm cluster as a worker or manager node.
advertiseAddressDescription: The address this node advertises to other nodes.
advertiseAddressDescriptionInit: The address other nodes will use to connect to this manager.
listenAddressDescription: The address this node listens on for swarm traffic.
managerAddressesDescription: One or more manager addresses (one per line).
managerAddressRequired: At least one manager address is required
joinTokenDescription: The token used to join the swarm as a worker or manager.
managerAddressDescription: List of manager nodes to connect to.
leaveSwarmConfirmDescription: Are you sure you want to leave the Docker Swarm? This action cannot be undone.
forceLeave: Force leave (even if this is the last manager)
workerCommandCopied: Worker join command copied to clipboard
managerCommandCopied: Manager join command copied to clipboard
useTokenToJoinWorker: Use this token to join new worker nodes to the swarm.
useTokenToJoinManager: Use this token to join new manager nodes to the swarm.
noNodesDescription: No nodes are currently part of this swarm.
pleaseWaitSwarmLoading: Please wait while the swarm state is being loaded.
notInSwarmModeDescription: This Docker host is not part of a swarm cluster. Initialize a new swarm to become the first manager, or join an existing swarm.
